nodes.name: Trigger: New Client Won
nodes.notes: Manually triggered via webhook or when HubSpot deal moves to 'Won'. Expects: company_name, primary_contact, contact_email, contact_title, arr, sales_team_size, crm, scope_tier, duration, start_date, challenges, agreed_scope

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ name: $json.company_name, multiple_assignees: true, features: { due_dates: { enabled: true }, time_tracking: { enabled: true }, tags: { enabled: true }, priorities: { enabled: true } } }) }}

nodes.name: Create OneDrive Folder
nodes.notes: Creates client folder in OneDrive. Also creates subfolders: Deliverables, Meeting Notes, Reports

nodes.name: Create Forecast Sheet
nodes.notes: Creates forecast spreadsheet from template. Add tabs: Pipeline, Targets, Historical, Last Week Snapshot

values.name: system_prompt
values.value: You are a RevOps consultant's operations assistant. You help generate onboarding materials for new B2B SaaS clients. Your outputs should be professional, thorough, and set clear expectations for the engagement.

values.name: user_prompt

parameters.subject: =Welcome! Kicking off our RevOps engagement — {{ $('Prepare Roster Entry').first().json['Client Name'] }}

nodes.name: Create Welcome Email Draft
nodes.notes: Set to createDraft — review before sending

parameters.subject: =✅ Client Onboarded: {{ $('Prepare Roster Entry').first().json['Client Name'] }}
parameters.message:
=

New Client Setup Complete

  • ClickUp Space: Created
  • OneDrive Folder: Created
  • Forecast Sheet: Created
  • Client Roster: Updated
  • Welcome email draft: Ready in Gmail

Next: Review welcome email, configure meeting day/time in Roster, set up Toggl project.
